title: TBAS utils
description: Shared sub-schemas reused by every TBAS per-family document (oscillator, timer, latch). Identification (part/thermal/mechanical) mirrors the AAS/SAS pattern and reuses the PEAS datasheetInfo* bases. The supply block is TBAS-specific: time bases are single-channel, and the OCXO oven makes warm-up power a first-class spec. Fractional-frequency quantities (tolerance, stability, aging, pull range) are stored as DIMENSIONLESS fractions (1 ppm = 1e-6), keeping the all-SI rule; descriptions state the ppm equivalence.

part.title: timeBasePart
part.description: Part identification — shared across all time-base families. Extends the PEAS datasheetInfoPartBase.

package.description: Manufacturer's exact package designation (e.g. '3225 4-pad ceramic', 'SOT-23-5'). Complements case, which holds the generic industry code.

thermal.title: timeBaseThermal
thermal.description: Thermal section — extends the PEAS datasheetInfoThermal (operating-temperature range). Frequency stability is specified OVER this range, so the range is load-bearing for oscillators.

mechanical.title: timeBaseMechanical
mechanical.description: Mechanical specs — extends PEAS datasheetInfoMechanical with a package case field.

case.description: Package name (2016, 3225, SOIC-8, ...) — mirrors part.case for convenience.

supply.title: timeBaseSupply
supply.description: Power-supply operating window. Time bases are single-channel, so the current is the device current (no per-channel split). warmupPower exists because ovenized oscillators draw watts while the oven heats — a defining OCXO spec, meaningless for other classes (absent there).

minimumSupplyVoltage.description: Minimum operating supply voltage, in V.

maximumSupplyVoltage.description: Maximum operating supply voltage, in V.

currentConsumption.description: Steady-state operating supply current (no load / CMOS load as datasheet-specified), in A.

warmupPower.description: Peak supply power during oven warm-up, in W (OCXO only; steady-state power is derivable as supply voltage x currentConsumption and is NOT stored).

oscillatorTechnology.title: oscillatorTechnology
oscillatorTechnology.description: Resonator / oscillator technology class. quartzCrystal and ceramicResonator are BARE resonators (no active circuit: loadCapacitance / equivalentSeriesResistance / resonantImpedance / builtInCapacitance apply, supply does not); all other values are complete oscillators. programmable covers factory-programmed blanks, pin-selectable XOs and DCXOs (the mechanism does not change the parametric surface). Compound classes are combinations, not new values: TCXO + pullRange = VCTCXO. Deliberately OUT of scope: RTC modules (calendar ICs — CTAS territory), clock generators / buffers / jitter attenuators (clock distribution, not a time base), RF VCOs and SAW devices (RF synthesis/remote-control, no converter role).

enableFunction.title: enableFunction
enableFunction.description: Output-control pin function of a packaged oscillator (the DigiKey 'Function' filter): outputEnable gates the output stage (oscillator keeps running), standby powers the whole device down (restart costs startupTime), triState floats the output. none = no control pin.

oscillatorMode.title: oscillatorMode
oscillatorMode.description: Quartz vibration mode. Fundamental AT-cut tops out around 50 MHz in standard packages (inverted-mesa HFF reaches ~250 MHz); overtone cuts extend higher. Meaningless for MEMS/RC.

outputType.title: outputType
outputType.description: Electrical output format. Single-ended CMOS tops out around 250 MHz; LVDS/LVPECL/HCSL are the differential formats used above that. clippedSine is the TCXO-typical low-power format; sine is a pure analog output (OCXO/lab class). none is a bare resonator (quartzCrystal).

timerTechnology.title: timerTechnology
timerTechnology.description: Timer process/class. bipolar555 is the classic NE555 (4.5-16 V, <=500 kHz astable); cmos555 the LMC/TLC class (down to 1.5 V, up to ~3 MHz); precision covers dedicated timing ICs with sub-1% accuracy; programmable covers digitally-set timers.

logicFamily.title: logicFamily
logicFamily.description: Logic process family of a discrete latch part.
